name: rsp
summary: RSP scheduler thread + GFX task manager + screen clear + VI sync. Thread 4 loop: receive OSTask -> osSpTaskStart -> wait SP/DP. Also VSync/buffer swap (rsp_vi_sync), framebuffer/zbuffer clear (rsp_clear_screen), task submission (rsp_submit_gfx_tasks), per-frame render callbacks (rsp_register_callback).

functions.name: rsp_clear_callbacks
functions.summary: Clears all 20 render callback slots (sRenderCallbacks) to NULL. Called during game init and reinit.

functions.name: rsp_register_callback
functions.summary: Registers a render setup callback (s32 (*)(void *)) with its argument into the first free slot of the sRenderCallbacks array. Used by model.c (texture DMA, render mode, prim color), player.c (replay), cam_follow.c (world wrap).

functions.name: rsp_clear_screen
functions.summary: Sets up display list to clear framebuffer and zbuffer. Uses G_CYC_FILL for zbuffer (writes G_MAXFBZ), then G_CYC_COPY for color fill with clear color (sClearColorR/G/B). Checks gGfxFlags & GFX_NO_ZCLEAR to skip zbuffer fill. If sClearZbuffer is TRUE, optionally clears only partial height (x_6c647b3a + 20 lines).

functions.name: rsp_task_init
functions.summary: Initializes three OSTask structures with ucode pointers: sGfxTaskF3D (Fast3D), sGfxTaskDR (DarkRift 3D), sGfxTaskExtra (extra F3D). Resets sGfxTaskCount to 0.

functions.name: rsp_scheduler_thread
functions.summary: Thread 4 entry. Infinite loop: receive OSTask from gRspMessageQueue, clear SP/DP event queues, start task via osSpTaskStart, wait for SP completion, then wait for DP completion (unless M_AUDTASK). Tracks timing in gRspTimeTotal/gRdpTimeTotal. Notifies other threads via sContMesgQueue when idle.

functions.name: rsp_submit_gfx_tasks
functions.summary: Drains sContMesgQueue, writes back dcache, then sends GFX tasks to RSP queue: always sends sGfxTaskF3D + sGfxTaskDR, optionally sGfxTaskExtra if gGfxFlags & GFX_EXTRA_DL. Tasks are built from current GFX context (D_80080100) with write pointers gF3dDisplayListPtr/gDrBatchPtr/gF3dExtraListPtr. Only submits if sFbBusy is FALSE.

functions.name: rsp_wait_idle
functions.summary: Waits for all pending GFX tasks to complete. If sGfxTaskCount > 0, waits on sContMesgQueue, resets count and time via osSetTime(0). Sync states: 0=done, 1=syncing, 7=start.

functions.name: rsp_vi_sync
functions.summary: Vertical retrace sync: waits for VI event via osRecvMesg on sViEventQueue. If queue was full, sets sFbBusy=TRUE. If swap flag arg is set, calls osViSwapBuffer to toggle framebuffers.

functions.name: rsp_game_init
functions.summary: Full game initialization: sets resolution (320x240), allocates framebuffer/zbuffer/heap, calls all subsystem inits (WAD, matrix, buttons, audio, task pool, object pool, camera, lights, player slots, textures, sparks). Reads screen config from gScreenProfiles[profile_id] for colors and fog params. NON_EQUIVALENT — asm fallback.

functions.name: rsp_game_reinit
functions.summary: Post-match/subsystem reinitialization: defrags heap, reloads WAD resources, reinitializes audio, buttons, task pool, object pool, camera, lights. Reads screen config colors/fog from gScreenProfiles[profile_id]. Sets sFbBusy=TRUE.

globals.name: sOverlayBrightness
globals.summary: Vertex color brightness for overlay geometry (0/200). Set during init, used in main.c for Vtx color

globals.name: sFadeThreshold
globals.summary: Fade transition threshold (100). Compared with D_8005BEFC (fade alpha counter) in present.c and main.c

globals.name: sGfxTaskCount
globals.summary: Graphics task counter: incremented when submitting, checked when waiting for idle

globals.name: sFbBusy
globals.summary: Framebuffer busy flag: TRUE when VI swap is in progress, FALSE when ready

globals.name: sClearZbuffer
globals.summary: Whether to clear zbuffer each frame (TRUE/FALSE). Set by menu/init, checked by rsp_clear_screen

globals.name: gGfxFlags
globals.summary: Global graphics control flags. Bits: GFX_SKIP_SCENE(1), GFX_EXTRA_DL(2), GFX_FLAG_4(4), GFX_NO_ZCLEAR(8), GFX_SHADOW_MODE(0x10), GFX_MENU_OVERLAY(0x20), GFX_BORDER_AROUND(0x40). Used across 10+ files.

globals.name: sRenderCallbacks
globals.summary: Array of 20 render setup callbacks. Iterated in main.c render loop; callback returns 0 to be removed. Registered via rsp_register_callback

globals.name: D_800801E0
globals.summary: Unused BSS variable — never read or written

globals.name: sZbufFillSkipped
globals.summary: TRUE when zbuffer fill was skipped (gGfxFlags & GFX_NO_ZCLEAR). Checked by model.c render mode setup

types.name: UnkStruct10
types.summary: 8-byte timing config struct: {s16 start1, s16 end1, s16 start2, s16 end2}. Used for fade/timing pairs (0,90,0,0) and (0,233,500,0)

cross_file_references.gF3dDisplayListPtr: extern in main.c, read in background.c, rsp.c, scroll.c, model.c, main.c
cross_file_references.gF3dExtraListPtr: extern in main.c, read in rsp.c, main.c
cross_file_references.gDrBatchPtr: extern in main.c, read in rsp.c, model.c, main.c, trail.c, item.c, sparks.c
cross_file_references.gRspTimeTotal: OSTime accumulator in main.c for RSP task timing
cross_file_references.gRdpTimeTotal: OSTime accumulator in main.c for RDP task timing
cross_file_references.sGfxTaskF3D: OSTask defined in gfx_data.c, referenced in rsp.c
cross_file_references.sGfxTaskDR: OSTask defined in gfx_data.c, referenced in rsp.c
cross_file_references.sGfxTaskExtra: OSTask defined in gfx_data.c, referenced in rsp.c

open_questions: UnkStruct10 field meanings — only used as timing/fade init pairs
TASK_FLAG_10/TASK_FLAG_20 exact semantics — user kept hash-like names pending further analysis
